registry-core-helper/src/main/java/gr/uo.general_idea: Remove the @Component annotation from the abstract service class to prevent it from being registered as a Spring bean.
Rename the abstract method getResourceType to getResourceTypeName to clarify it returns a string identifier rather than the object.
Refactor resource type initialization logic into a private inner class ResourceTypeInfo to encapsulate state and lazy initialization.
Update method calls to use the renamed getResourceTypeName method instead of the old getResourceType.
Delegate access to resource type, browse by, and labels to the new ResourceTypeInfo inner class.
Modernize logging statement to use parameterized placeholders instead of string concatenation.
